title: replace net_raw with setuid
body:
podman does not allow setting CAP_NET_RAW

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

@rhatdan @baude @vrothberg @mheon @ashcrow PTAL.

test passes with this change on f33.

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@cevich any idea whatsup with `sys remote fedora-32 root host`. The rerun says it failed, and even the first failed run just gave some unhelpful message.
@cevich so `int remote fedora-31 root host` says `CI agent stopped responding`, and `int remote ubuntu-20 root host` says `Timed out`.
